---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants, Coordinator, PrepareMsg, VoteYesMsg, VoteNoMsg, CommitMsg, AbortMsg, AllMsgs, AllParticipants, AllCoordinators, AllMsgTypes

        /\ coordinator = Coordinator
        /\ prepareMsg = PrepareMsg
        /\ voteYesMsg = VoteYesMsg
        /\ voteNoMsg = VoteNoMsg
        /\ commitMsg = CommitMsg
        /\ abortMsg = AbortMsg
        /\ allMsgs = AllMsgs
        /\ allParticipants = AllParticipants
        /\ allCoordinators = AllCoordinators
        /\ allMsgTypes = AllMsgTypes

Next == /\ participants' = participants
        /\ coordinator' = coordinator
        /\ prepareMsg' = prepareMsg
        /\ voteYesMsg' = voteYesMsg
        /\ voteNoMsg' = voteNoMsg
        /\ commitMsg' = commitMsg
        /\ abortMsg' = abortMsg
        /\ allMsgs' = allMsgs
        /\ allParticipants' = allParticipants
        /\ allCoordinators' = allCoordinators
        /\ allMsgTypes' = allMsgTypes

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, prepareMsg, voteYesMsg, voteNoMsg, commitMsg, abortMsg, allMsgs, allParticipants, allCoordinators, allMsgTypes>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state


  state = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"];  (* "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)

  for i \in 1..N do
    fork[i] == FALSE;
    state[i] == "thinking";
  end for;

    for i \in 1..N do

        state[i] == "hungry";

          forks[Left(i)] == TRUE;
          forks[Right(i)] == TRUE;
          state[i] == "eating";

        forks[Left(i)] == FALSE;
        forks[Right(i)] == FALSE;
        state[i] == "thinking";

    end for;


*)

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> -> IF state[i] = "thinking" THEN "hungry" ELSE state[i]]
        /\ forks' = [i \in 1..N |-> -> IF state[i] = "thinking" THEN forks[i]


        /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> -> IF state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[Left(i)] = TRUE /\ forks[Right(i)] = TRUE THEN "eating" ELSE state[i]]
        /\ forks' = [i \in 1..N |-> -> IF state[i] = "eating" THEN FALSE ELSE forks[i]]
        /\ state' = [i \in 1..N |-> -> IF state[i] = "eating" THEN "thinking" ELSE state[i]]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [i \in 1..N |-> -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ state \in [i \in 1..N |-> -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : 
              /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ num[i] = 0

choose(i) == 
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ num[i] = 0
  /\ LET maxNum == Max(Seq(1..N))
     IN num[i] = maxNum + 1

enter(i) == 
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ \A j \in 1..N \ {i} : 
       (num[j] = 0) \/ (num[j] > num[i]) \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i)

exit(i) == 
  /\ num[i] = 0

Next == \E i \in 1..N : 
         (choose(i) \/ enter(i) \/ exit(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head and tail indices *)
(* head points to the next element to be dequeued *)
(* tail points to the next position to enqueue *)
(* count tracks the number of elements in the queue *)

Init == /\ q \in Seq(K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]  (* initialize all slots to 0 *)

Producer == /\ count < K
            /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
            /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
            /\ count' = count + 1
            /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ count > 0
            /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
            /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
            /\ count' = count - 1
            /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                    /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE
                 /\ readers' = <<>>
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
                 /\ writer_active' = TRUE
                    /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = Append(file, <<>>)
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, <<>>)
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts


  (* --state Increment

  *)
  (* --state Merge

  *)
end
*)

(* --state Init
counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]
*)

(* --state Increment
counts[n][n] := counts[n][n] + 1
*)

(* --state Merge
counts[n][m] := Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])
*)

(* --state Next
counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> IF n = m THEN counts[n][n] + 1

*)

(* --state Spec
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
*)

(* --state TypeOK
TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
*)
